mapper.sql: evaluateId, scId, userId, headImgUrl, nickname, evLevel, evContent, evaluatImgUrl, evaluatDate
mapper.insert:
insert into store_coach_evaluate
evaluateId,
scId,
userId,
headImgUrl,
nickname,
evLevel,
evContent,
evaluatImgUrl,
evaluatDate,
#{evaluateId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{scId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{headImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{evLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{evContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{evaluatImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{evaluatDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update store_coach_evaluate
scId = #{scId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
headImgUrl = #{headImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
nickname = #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
evLevel = #{evLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER},
evContent = #{evContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
evaluatImgUrl = #{evaluatImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
evaluatDate = #{evaluatDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where evaluateId = #{evaluateId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update store_coach_evaluate set scId = #{scId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, headImgUrl = #{headImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nickname = #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, evLevel = #{evLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, evContent = #{evContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, evaluatImgUrl = #{evaluatImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, evaluatDate = #{evaluatDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where evaluateId = #{evaluateId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT ifnull(SUM(evLevel), 0) FROM store_coach_evaluate WHERE scId = #{coachId}
SELECT count(*) FROM store_coach_evaluate WHERE scId = #{coachId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM store_coach_evaluate ce LEFT JOIN user_info u ON u.userId = ce.userId WHERE ce.scId = #{coachId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM store_coach_evaluate ce LEFT JOIN user_info u ON u.userId = ce.userId WHERE ce.scId = #{coachId}
